description: Permission Dialogs System: Create a reusable PermissionDialog widget with static helpers for microphone, camera, notifications, and photos. Update voice_input_widget.dart and plus_panel_widget.dart to show the permission dialog before requesting OS permissions or opening camera/picker.
steps: Create frontend/lib/presentation/widgets/common/permission_dialog.dart with a PermissionDialog class that has: a static show() method returning Future<bool> (true=allow, false=deny), static helper methods microphone(BuildContext), camera(BuildContext), notifications(BuildContext), photos(BuildContext) each calling show() with appropriate icon, title, and reason text. Dialog style: AlertDialog with rounded corners (16px radius), top icon in a colored circle (64px diameter, AppColors.persian background, white icon), title in DM Serif Display 20px, reason text in DM Sans 14px textSecondary, two buttons (Deny: outline style, Allow: filled Persian Orange). Theme-aware (isDark checks).

Update frontend/lib/presentation/widgets/chat/voice_input_widget.dart: Import PermissionDialog. In _startRecording(), before calling Permission.microphone.request(), first call PermissionDialog.microphone(context). If it returns false, return early without requesting OS permission. If true, proceed with the existing Permission.microphone.request() flow.

Update frontend/lib/presentation/widgets/chat/plus_panel_widget.dart: Import PermissionDialog. In _pickPhoto(), before calling _imagePicker.pickImage(source: ImageSource.gallery), show PermissionDialog.photos(context). If denied, return early. In _pickCamera() and _pickScan(), show PermissionDialog.camera(context) before calling _imagePicker.pickImage(source: ImageSource.camera). If denied, return early.
acceptance_criteria: permission_dialog.dart exists with PermissionDialog class and all 4 static helpers
show() returns Future<bool> - true for allow, false for deny
voice_input_widget.dart shows microphone permission dialog before OS permission request
plus_panel_widget.dart shows photos/camera permission dialog before picker access
All files pass flutter analyze without errors
No dynamic types, strict null safety
Dialog uses DM Serif Display for title, DM Sans for body
findings: Flutter SDK not available in sandbox environment (consistent with FEAT-001 and FEAT-002 findings). Verified correctness via manual code inspection: PermissionDialog class created with private constructor, all 4 static helper methods (microphone, camera, notifications, photos) returning Future<bool>, show() uses result ?? false pattern for null safety. voice_input_widget.dart calls PermissionDialog.microphone(context) before Permission.microphone.request(). plus_panel_widget.dart calls PermissionDialog.photos in _pickPhoto, PermissionDialog.camera in both _pickCamera and _pickScan. All imports resolve correctly. No dynamic types, strict null safety throughout.
